name: pricing-toggle
description: A pricing grid with a monthly/annual Switch that flips every price at once; the figure swaps in a vertical fade so the toggle reads clearly without shifting the layout. One plan carries the accent. The toggle is a labelled group and the grid collapses from one column on mobile to one per plan on desktop. The price transition falls back to a plain fade under prefers-reduced-motion.

notes: The billing toggle is a role=group labelled via aria-labelledby and the Switch carries an explicit aria-label
The section title is an h2 that labels the section landmark; each plan name is an h3
Each plan's features are a real ul list
CTAs render as real links when given an href, otherwise as buttons
The price swap animation respects prefers-reduced-motion via MotionProvider

intents: a pricing section with a monthly/annual billing toggle
a pricing grid whose prices switch between monthly and yearly
examples: <PricingToggle title="Pay monthly or yearly" annualHint="−20%" plans={[{ name: 'Pro', monthlyPrice: '$29', annualPrice: '$24', featured: true, features: ['Unlimited projects'], action: { label: 'Choose Pro', href: '/signup' } }]} />
